error.msg: Obsolescent function 'usleep' called. It is recommended to use 'nanosleep' or 'setitimer' instead.
error.verbose: The obsolescent function 'usleep' is called. POSIX.1-2001 declares usleep() function obsolescent and POSIX.1-2008 removes it. It is recommended that new applications use the 'nanosleep' or 'setitimer' function.

error.msg: Variable 'active_client' can be declared as pointer to const
error.verbose: Variable 'active_client' can be declared as pointer to const

location.info: Variable 'active_client' can be declared as pointer to const

error.msg: Parameter 'wsi' can be declared as pointer to const
error.verbose: Parameter 'wsi' can be declared as pointer to const

location.info: Parameter 'wsi' can be declared as pointer to const
